raw_block:
–The Hebrew word “maneh” is translated “pound,”1Ki 
10:17;Ezr 2:69;Ne 7:71,72
–And is equivalent to almost one pound (fourteen ounces)
–In John the weight was equivalent to about twelve ouncesJoh 12:3
–In Luke the Greek word “mina” is translated “pound,” and worth 
approximately one-hundred denarii (more than three months’ wages)Lu 19:13-25
–SeeMEASURE
–SeeWEIGHTS
